name: ai-translator
description: AI 驱动的 Chrome 智能翻译插件

scripts.build: echo 'No build required - load directly in Chrome'
scripts.zip: rm -f ai-translator.zip && zip -r ai-translator.zip manifest.json _locales/ background/ content/ i18n/ options/ popup/ icons/icon16.png icons/icon32.png icons/icon48.png icons/icon128.png icons/icon16-light.png icons/icon32-light.png icons/icon48-light.png icons/icon128-light.png -x '*.DS_Store'
